understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to guide the player to the goal gem tile marked '+', while avoiding spike hazards, within a limited number of turns and attempts.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is primarily horizontal (MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT), after which gravity automatically pulls the player in the current gravity direction until landing on a support tile, spike, or the goal. CLICK actions are used to remove breakable blocks to open new paths, and UNDO can revert the previous action. Hazards like spikes end the run if landed on, making it necessary to plan moves and clicks based on predicted landing locations. Each level imposes a strict turn and attempt limit.
